title: aster trigonicus
intro: Aster trigonicus, also known as the three-lobed aster or fragrant aster, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the southeastern United States. The medicinal properties of Aster trigonicus include its use as an anti-inflammatory and its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of consuming Aster trigonicus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Aster trigonicus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
